name: GetCustomerUsers
description: Returns all users mapped to the current customer via CustomerService.GetUsers.

name: CreateUser
description: Creates a new user under a customer. Validates email uniqueness, email format, profile access. Sends password email. Assigns default roles. Adds profile access.

name: DeleteUser
description: Soft-deletes a user. Requires ManageUsers + CanUserAccessUser (or SuperAdmin). Protected users cannot be deleted without SuperAdmin.

name: ReactivateUser
description: Reactivates a soft-deleted user. Same access requirements as DeleteUser.

name: SetUserRoleAccess
description: Sets role access (true/false) for a list of roleIds on a specific user. ManageUsers OR SuperAdmin required. Protected user guard.

name: GetCustomerUserRoleAccess
description: Returns all UserRoles with HasAccess flag per user for a given customer. Optionally filters to only roles the customer has access to.

name: GetAllProfileRoles
description: Returns all distinct profile roles assigned across profiles of a customer. Returns IdAndValueGeneric<string> list.

name: ManageCustomerLog
description: Get and update customer log/note entries (admin audit trail). GetCustomerLogs returns list; UpdateCustomerLog updates text while preserving DateInsertedUTC.
